description.value:
Trigger You are reduced to 0 Hit Points and would gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Dying] condition or would otherwise die.

You've discovered the fabled occult pahtra art of cheating death or have made substantial contingencies that help keep that legend alive. You prevent yourself from dying and regain Hit Points equal to @Damage[(6d8+floor(@actor.level/2))[healing]]{6d8 plus half your level}. If the cause of your death was a condition or effect that would still cause you to die after regaining Hit Points, such as a high value on the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Doomed] condition, you suppress that condition for 1 minute.
